reviews.title: It's hot.
reviews.text: The moment you enter the lobby, the air conditioning is insufficient to the point of being suffocating. The air conditioning in the breakfast restaurant is also insufficient. The air conditioning in the room doesn't adjust the temperature. There's no refrigerator in the room. It is really not recommended in the middle of summer. The staff's attitude is reassuringly friendly.

reviews.title: Un Hilton en el medio del desierto
reviews.positives:
La habitación y la cama eran geniales.
Baño excepcional.
Tiene un buen parking
Las instalaciones: gimnasio y piscina
El personal competente y eficaz

reviews.title: REALLY NICE
reviews.text: I really enjoyed my stay here. Would come again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 寬闊的場地，舒適的空間，適合放鬆和好友家人閒聊，也適合商務之旅。

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Beautiful building with quite huge garden/bamboo park. Great breakfast buffet.
reviews.negatives: Cleanliness must be absolutely improved…not acceptable for a 5-stars-Hilton…

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff were excellent and very helpful.
